budget_2026.title: Union Budget 2026
budget_2026.explanation: The government has introduced Budget 2026 focusing on economic growth, infrastructure development, and digital transformation.
budget_2026.impact: Positive impact on businesses and long-term economic growth.

stock_market_crash.title: Stock Market Crash
stock_market_crash.explanation: The stock market is falling due to global economic uncertainty, rising inflation, and investor panic.
stock_market_crash.impact: Short-term losses for investors but potential long-term opportunities.

inflation.title: Inflation Rise
inflation.explanation: Inflation refers to the increase in prices of goods and services over time, reducing purchasing power.
inflation.impact: Higher cost of living and reduced savings value.

startup_funding.title: Startup Funding News
startup_funding.explanation: Several startups have raised significant funding, showing strong investor confidence in the tech sector.
startup_funding.impact: Boosts employment and innovation in the economy.
